intent: Add a 4x4 powder room next to the Foyer (placed left-of Foyer with a door connecting to Foyer.left).

ops.note: modify.mjs has no AST op for adding a `connect` statement, so this line was appended to the connect block via a minimal text edit so the new bathroom is reachable per the critic's reachability rule (which only walks `connect` edges and matched-`open` walls).
ops.appended_line: connect Foyer.left to Powder.right door at 50%

warnings.message: Shared wall conflict: Bedroom2.left is 'window' but Bath2.right is 'solid'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.
Shared wall conflict: Bath2.left is 'solid' but MasterBath.right is 'window'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.

findings.message: Bathroom "Powder" opens directly off the entry "Foyer". Most occupants prefer bathrooms reached through a hallway or living area, not the entry.
findings.suggestion: add a hallway buffer or move the bathroom door to face a hallway / living room instead of Foyer

warnings.message: Shared wall conflict: Bedroom2.left is 'window' but Bath2.right is 'solid'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.
Shared wall conflict: Bath2.left is 'solid' but MasterBath.right is 'window'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.

outcome: applied; plan still valid (no errors). Critic flags one expected `bathroom_off_entry` warning because the user explicitly asked for a powder room off the foyer; surfaced for the user but not a bail-out. Carry-over warnings from Turn 2 (interior 'window' walls) remain unchanged.
